item.title: SimpleX Chat [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: SimpleX Chat [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: simplexchat
item.itunes:summary:
SimpleX Chat
(Chat & Messenging)
SimpleX - the first messaging platform operating without user identifiers of any kind - 100% private by design!
Security assessment was done by Trail of Bits in November 2022.

SimpleX Chat features:

- end-to-end encrypted messages, with editing, replies and deletion of messages.
- sending end-to-end encrypted images and files.
- single-use and long-term user addresses.
- secret chat groups - only group members know it exists and who is the member.
- end-to-end encrypted audio and video calls.
- private instant notifications.
- portable chat profile - you can transfer your chat contacts and history to another device (terminal or mobile).
- encrypted app database and files in the app storage (except videos).
- 18 interface languages.

SimpleX Chat advantages:

* Full privacy of your identity, profile, contacts and metadata: unlike any other existing messaging platform, SimpleX uses no phone numbers or any other identifiers assigned to the users - not even random numbers. This protects the privacy of who you are communicating with, hiding it from SimpleX platform servers and from any observers.
* Complete protection against spam and abuse: as you have no identifier on SimpleX platform, you cannot be contacted unless you share a one-time invitation link or an optional temporary user address.
* Full ownership, control and security of your data: SimpleX stores all user data on client devices, the messages are only held temporarily on SimpleX relay servers until they are received.
* Decentralized network: you can use SimpleX with your own servers and still communicate with people using the servers that are pre-configured in the apps or any other SimpleX servers.

You can connect to anybody you know via link or scan QR code (in the video call or in person) and start sending messages instantly - no emails, phone numbers or passwords needed.
Your profile and contacts are only stored in the app on your device - our servers do not have access to this information.
All messages are end-to-end encrypted using open-source double-ratchet protocol; the messages are routed via our servers using open-source SimpleX Messaging Protocol.

Please send us any questions via the app or submit an issue on GitHub.

Follow us on Mastodon, Twitter and Reddit for the latest updates.

Once you install SimpleX Chat, "connect to developers" for any questions, to share feedback, and to discover the groups (the link for directory service will be in response).
[read more]
item.description:
SimpleX Chat
(Chat & Messenging)
SimpleX - the first messaging platform operating without user identifiers of any kind - 100% private by design!
Security assessment was done by Trail of Bits in November 2022.

SimpleX Chat features:

- end-to-end encrypted messages, with editing, replies and deletion of messages.
- sending end-to-end encrypted images and files.
- single-use and long-term user addresses.
- secret chat groups - only group members know it exists and who is the member.
- end-to-end encrypted audio and video calls.
- private instant notifications.
- portable chat profile - you can transfer your chat contacts and history to another device (terminal or mobile).
- encrypted app database and files in the app storage (except videos).
- 18 interface languages.

SimpleX Chat advantages:

* Full privacy of your identity, profile, contacts and metadata: unlike any other existing messaging platform, SimpleX uses no phone numbers or any other identifiers assigned to the users - not even random numbers. This protects the privacy of who you are communicating with, hiding it from SimpleX platform servers and from any observers.
* Complete protection against spam and abuse: as you have no identifier on SimpleX platform, you cannot be contacted unless you share a one-time invitation link or an optional temporary user address.
* Full ownership, control and security of your data: SimpleX stores all user data on client devices, the messages are only held temporarily on SimpleX relay servers until they are received.
* Decentralized network: you can use SimpleX with your own servers and still communicate with people using the servers that are pre-configured in the apps or any other SimpleX servers.

You can connect to anybody you know via link or scan QR code (in the video call or in person) and start sending messages instantly - no emails, phone numbers or passwords needed.
Your profile and contacts are only stored in the app on your device - our servers do not have access to this information.
All messages are end-to-end encrypted using open-source double-ratchet protocol; the messages are routed via our servers using open-source SimpleX Messaging Protocol.

Please send us any questions via the app or submit an issue on GitHub.

Follow us on Mastodon, Twitter and Reddit for the latest updates.

Once you install SimpleX Chat, "connect to developers" for any questions, to share feedback, and to discover the groups (the link for directory service will be in response).
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
SimpleX Chat
(Chat & Messenging)
SimpleX - the first messaging platform operating without user identifiers of any kind - 100% private by design!
Security assessment was done by Trail of Bits in November 2022.

SimpleX Chat features:

- end-to-end encrypted messages, with editing, replies and deletion of messages.
- sending end-to-end encrypted images and files.
- single-use and long-term user addresses.
- secret chat groups - only group members know it exists and who is the member.
- end-to-end encrypted audio and video calls.
- private instant notifications.
- portable chat profile - you can transfer your chat contacts and history to another device (terminal or mobile).
- encrypted app database and files in the app storage (except videos).
- 18 interface languages.

SimpleX Chat advantages:

* Full privacy of your identity, profile, contacts and metadata: unlike any other existing messaging platform, SimpleX uses no phone numbers or any other identifiers assigned to the users - not even random numbers. This protects the privacy of who you are communicating with, hiding it from SimpleX platform servers and from any observers.
* Complete protection against spam and abuse: as you have no identifier on SimpleX platform, you cannot be contacted unless you share a one-time invitation link or an optional temporary user address.
* Full ownership, control and security of your data: SimpleX stores all user data on client devices, the messages are only held temporarily on SimpleX relay servers until they are received.
* Decentralized network: you can use SimpleX with your own servers and still communicate with people using the servers that are pre-configured in the apps or any other SimpleX servers.

You can connect to anybody you know via link or scan QR code (in the video call or in person) and start sending messages instantly - no emails, phone numbers or passwords needed.
Your profile and contacts are only stored in the app on your device - our servers do not have access to this information.
All messages are end-to-end encrypted using open-source double-ratchet protocol; the messages are routed via our servers using open-source SimpleX Messaging Protocol.

Please send us any questions via the app or submit an issue on GitHub.

Follow us on Mastodon, Twitter and Reddit for the latest updates.

Once you install SimpleX Chat, "connect to developers" for any questions, to share feedback, and to discover the groups (the link for directory service will be in response).
[read more]

item.title: Mac Undelete Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Mac Undelete Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: restoredeleted
item.itunes:summary:
Mac Undelete Tool
(Utilities)
Pioneering Mac undelete application uncomplicatedly salvages each accidentally erased data from memory cards with all variety of file extensions for example jpg, midi, wmf, tiff, mpeg, bmp, gif, jpeg, mp4, mp3, emf, avi, wav and many others. Revolutionary memory card data recovery software for Mac OS X is enormously precious to restore mislaid files through whole grouping of memory cards containing compact flash memory card, multimedia card, Micro SD Memory Card, Compact Flash, Mini-SD card, xD Picture card, Memory stick pro, Memory stick pro duo, Memory stick, secure digital cards etc and also tool endorses entire higher capacity memory cards such as 64 MB, 128MB, 256MB, 512MB, 1GB, 2GB, 4GB etc. Trustworthy Mac undelete program rapidly restores absolutely corrupted data even after subsequent incidences such as human faults, bad sector in memory drives, unexpected virus or worm infections, fortuitously records deletion, hardware or software malfunctioning, formatted/reformatted memory cards, improper device handling, logical errors in memory cards and more. Innovative memory card data recovery utility for Apple Mac salvages entire vanished records through all principal maker brands of memory cards involving Acer, Nikon, Casio, Samsung, Jet flash, Toshiba, Konica, Hitachi, Pentax, Olympus, Fujitsu and others. Features: * Consistent Mac undelete software does not require any complementary software or hardware for reviving totally ruined video records. * Proficient memory card data recovery program for Mac proffer ultimate feature to show thumbnail preview of intended files earlier than factual recovery. * Graceful Mac undelete application exploits assorted standard or advanced searching algorithms to rescue misplaced terrific celebration images. * Dexterous memory card data recovery tool for Mac keeps pleasant graphical user interface so vital for beginner users to deal with tool with no expert assistance.

[read more]

item.title: Miniature Card Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Miniature Card Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: sdcardrecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Miniature Card Recovery
(Utilities)
Simplified Miniature Card Recovery utility is used to restore your lost pdf, images, word, songs, audio, multimedia, video data from logically corrupted memory cards within less time duration. Memory stick data rescue software provides easy and safe solution to regain and revive all your corrupted data files due to virus attacked from various branded memory card device. Cost effective card file recovery application has capability to restore lost multimedia documents such as images, wallpapers, audios and videos clips from software crashed SD card drive. MMC card salvation program is capable to rescue important official documents that have been misplaced while transferring data in between your computer and card device. Professional Miniature Card Recovery tool is used to restore corrupted data files and folders from various branded memory cards available in market within fewer mouse clicks. File retrieval utility has capability to recover erased important images and videos clips from various branded memory card of digital camera such as Fujifilm, HP, Kodak, Konica, Mustek, Nikon, Kingston, Micron, SanDisk etc in short period. Card data rescue software provides attractive GUI which helps user to recover their deleted files without seeking any external help.
[read more]

item.title: Restore Files USB Drive [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Restore Files USB Drive [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: restoredeleted
item.itunes:summary:
Restore Files USB Drive
(Utilities)
Do you want to retrieve lost or corrupted data documents folder? Download Restore files USB Drive program from www.restoredeletedfiles.org website that helps user to restore lost or misplaced formal data file and folder from different usb media drive without any special charge. File restoring download software provides simple and easy methods for retrieving audio, video, songs list, and music files.

[read more]

item.title: Restore Deleted Files Application [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Restore Deleted Files Application [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: restoredeleted
item.itunes:summary:
Restore Deleted Files Application
(Utilities)
Restore Deleted Files program available on website www.restoredeletedfiles.org along with instructions of usage and downloading. Retrieval application restores corrupted images, pictures, photos, audio, video, songs, music, etc from storage device by using amazing option of disk scan which automatically locate the position of deleted file and restores at specified location without any disturbance.

[read more]

GOD SPEED UNLOCKER

item.title: GOD SPEED MODE APK [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: GOD SPEED MODE APK [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GOD SPEED MODE APK
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
God Speed Mode
GODSPEED.apk + ToastGsm.apk install both

ToastGSM = Notified you when profile applied
GODSPEED.apk = Switch Profiles
[read more]

item.title: USB Digital Media Files Restore [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: USB Digital Media Files Restore [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: restoredeleted
item.itunes:summary:
USB Digital Media Files Restore
(Utilities)
Install magnificent USB Digital Media Files Restore application which provides interactive GUI that helps user in restoring deleted data from accidentally formatted data stick in short time duration. Widely used media grabbing program is very useful in retaining text file and documents from USB compact drive which were lost due to device crash.

[read more]
item.description:

[read more]

item.title: Restore Deleted Photos [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Restore Deleted Photos [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: restoredeleted
item.itunes:summary:
Restore Deleted Photos
(Utilities)
Download technically well configured Restore Deleted Photos application from website www.restoredeletedfiles.org to recover all lost snapshots from flesh drive, thumb drive or memory card lost due to improper device handling, power failure, accidental or intentional format. Windows based digital picture recovery software is mainly designed to get back erased photographs saved in different graphic formats including JPEG, PNG and BMP.

[read more]
item.description:

Windows based digital picture recovery software is mainly designed to get back erased photographs saved in different graphic formats including JPEG, PNG and BMP.

[read more]
